prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. Same California kitchen, daytime. A Japanese woman in her mid-30s (Yuki — semi-long hair, casual home clothes) opens the refrigerator door. Inside the fridge, everything is well-stocked — vegetables, containers, beverages — except one specific spot on the door shelf where her favorite yogurt (TJ's Honey Yogurt) usually sits. That spot is conspicuously empty. Yuki holds a smartphone in her other hand; the screen shows a notification (blurred). Her expression is calm, accepting — not angry. A small nod of 'understood.' The refrigerator's internal LED light gently illuminates her face from below-left. Window natural light fills the rest of the kitchen. Color grading: clean, bright, neutral film-like tones. The refrigerator whites and food colors are naturalistic. Glass shelves inside the fridge catch a barely perceptible prismatic spectral refraction (tiny rainbow hint on the glass edge). Composition: 16:9 wide frame. The refrigerator interior fills the left side of frame, large and detailed. Yuki stands on the right, upper body visible. The empty yogurt spot draws the eye. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 200. Fine film grain. Shallow depth — Yuki's face and the empty spot are sharp, background kitchen soft. The mood is a small absence that isn't upsetting — the AI correctly chose NOT to buy a substitute. Trust manifested as restraint.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, angry expression, sad atmosphere, dark room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, skin smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
